title: erigeron poliospermus
intro: Erigeron poliospermus, also known as Frostweed or White Fleabane, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family. The medicinal properties of Erigeron poliospermus include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Erigeron poliospermus include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and alleviate respiratory issues. Erigeron poliospermus can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, and is often employed in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
